text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian fails to reach first place at the
Kikuka Sho. She silently acknowledges her own
shortcomings...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she won't stop here. She resolves to
temper herself and grow even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon, who Narita Brian is still planning
on facing in the Arima Kinen, is surely growing
stronger as well...
